test-case.name: Register_FakeKind_GeneratesWithoutIssues_ButDegradesToLabel_TheDocumentedRuntimeBoundary
test-case.output: [Neo.UI] NeoMenuItemKinds: menu item kind 'radialDial' has no runtime MenuControlKind mapping (MenuControlKind stays a closed enum for built-ins) — the generated row falls back to a non-interactive Label.

test-case.name: UnknownTriggerKey_LogsWarning_DoesNotThrow
test-case.output: FlowEdge 'on' trigger has no recognized key (totallyUnknown); edge will never fire. Built-in keys: button, signal, toggleOn, toggleOff, viewShown, viewHidden, back, timer — or register a custom kind in NeoTriggerKinds.

test-case.name: Register_Null_WarnsAndIgnores_NeverThrows
test-case.output: [Neo.UI] NeoValidationRules: ignored a null rule.

test-case.name: Register_IgnoresNullAndNameless_WarnsButNeverThrows
test-case.output: [Neo.UI] NeoWidgetPresets: ignored a null/invalid entry. [Neo.UI] NeoWidgetPresets: ignored a null/invalid entry.

test-case.name: AnimationPresetDatabase_Get_MissingName_Warns
test-case.output: [Neo.UI] AnimationPresetDatabase '': no preset named 'NoSuchPreset' (0 presets registered).

test-case.name: EffectParams_ParseColorRef_InvalidHex_NoCallback_WarnsInsteadOfSilent
test-case.output: Neo UI: invalid color '#NOTAHEX' (expected #hex or a theme token) — falling back to white.

test-case.name: HideCategory_NoRegisteredView_Warns
test-case.output: [Neo.UI] UIView.HideCategory: no registered view matches category 'NoSuchMenu' (0 views registered).

test-case.name: ParticleEffectRegistry_ParseColorRef_InvalidHex_Warns
test-case.output: Neo UI: invalid color '#BADCOLOR' (expected #hex or a theme token) — falling back to white.

test-case.name: ShowCategory_NoRegisteredView_Warns
test-case.output: [Neo.UI] UIView.ShowCategory: no registered view matches category 'NoSuchMenu' (0 views registered).

test-case.name: Register_EmptyKind_WarnsAndIgnores_NeverThrows
test-case.output: [Neo.UI] NeoWidgetPalette: ignored a null/invalid entry.

test-case.name: CreateWidgetDetached_UnknownPreset_WarnsAndFallsBackToBareKind
test-case.output: Neo UI: preset 'NoSuchPalettePreset' not found — creating a bare 'button' instead.

test-case.name: Registry_GetKnownModule_NonNull_BogusId_WarnsAndReturnsNull
test-case.output: ParticleEffectRegistry.Get: no particle module 'totally-not-a-module' registered — the module will be skipped. Register one in ParticleEffectRegistry, or check the spec.
